- [x] create-non-coding-workflow: Draft non-coding workflow for top-N search → browse → summarize → aggregate outputs (JSON/Markdown). 🔴

- [ ] run-search-and-capture-urls: Run a search (Google or the repo CLI) and capture the top 5–10 result URLs (exclude ads/duplicates). 🟡

- [ ] summarize-each-page: Use an LLM (ChatGPT or similar) or the repo's `get-webpage-markdown` tool to produce a concise markdown summary + metadata for each page. 🔴
